steps.title: Identify the constraint-and-solution relationship
steps.content: The previous sentence establishes a limitation (humans cannot perceive four dimensions), and the blank must introduce how Metzinger transcends this through technique. The transition bridges constraint to creative solution.

steps.title: Apply the relationship to the choices
steps.content: ”That said,” acknowledges the limitation and pivots to the solution. The other three position the technique as supporting or restating the limitation rather than overcoming it. That matches choice D — D is correct.
